label: Gross income

label: Rent

label: Utilities

label: Transit cost
source_title: Bangkok BTS/MRT monthly ~1,200 THB

label: Internet cost
source_title: Bangkok fiber ~700 THB/month

label: Food cost
source_title: Bangkok food extremely cheap — street food 40-100 THB, restaurant 100-300 THB

label: Housing burden raw
source_title: Bangkok housing extremely affordable relative to quality — condos $300-800, houses cheaper outside center

label: Household debt burden raw
source_title: Bangkok formal-sector household debt lower than national aggregate. Strong informal economy supplements.

label: Working time pressure raw
source_title: Thailand actual work intensity lower than reported hours — sanuk culture, flexible schedules common

source_title: Bangkok BTS/MRT expanding rapidly, plus motorcycle taxis, Grab, boats. Accessible despite traffic.

label: Digital infrastructure raw
source_title: Bangkok 5G deployed, fiber broadband, PromptPay digital payments ubiquitous, e-gov improving

label: Climate and sunlight livability raw
source_title: Bangkok tropical — hot and humid but consistent, sunny, AC ubiquitous. Better than monsoon extremes.

label: Healthcare quality raw
source_title: Bangkok world-class private hospitals at fraction of Western cost. Medical tourism hub. Bumrungrad etc.

label: Education quality raw
source_title: Bangkok excellent international school network (ISB, NIST, Patana), Chulalongkorn/Mahidol improving

label: Equal opportunity raw
source_title: Thailand relatively strong gender participation, women in business and politics, but class divide significant

label: Hospitality and belonging raw
source_title: Bangkok legendary hospitality — Land of Smiles, service culture, expat-friendly, food culture

label: Tolerance and pluralism raw
source_title: Thailand Marriage Equality Act 2024 (2nd in Asia after Taiwan). Buddhist tolerance, all religions welcome, LGBTQ+ paradise.

label: Cultural public life raw
source_title: Bangkok extraordinary cultural life — temples, night markets, street food, nightlife, festivals, art scene

source_title: World Bank Total Fertility Rate 2023

source_title: Bangkok BOI incentives, growing startup scene, easy for foreigners to set up business with BOI promotion

source_title: Bangkok major FDI hub — automotive, electronics, digital economy. EEC corridor nearby.
